title: selliguea veitchii
intro: Selliguea veitchii, also known as the Malay silver-vine or Selaginella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Selliguea veitchii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
